description:
Create a Business Model Canvas (BMC) diagram for a new SaaS product called 'FraudShield AI'. The diagram should be titled 'FraudShield AI - Business Model Canvas' and must include the standard nine sections populated with the following content:

- Key Partners: Cloud infrastructure providers (AWS/GCP), Banking API partners, Regulatory compliance consultants
- Key Activities: ML model training and deployment, Real-time transaction monitoring, Platform maintenance
- Key Resources: Proprietary fraud detection algorithms, Data engineering team, GPU compute clusters
- Value Propositions: 99.7% fraud detection accuracy, Sub-100ms transaction screening, Reduced false positive rates by 60%
- Customer Relationships: Dedicated account managers, 24/7 technical support, Quarterly business reviews
- Channels: Direct enterprise sales, Partner integrations via API marketplace, Industry conferences
- Customer Segments: Mid-size banks and credit unions, E-commerce payment processors, Digital wallet providers
- Cost Structure: Cloud computing infrastructure, Data science team salaries, Regulatory compliance costs
- Revenue Streams: Monthly SaaS subscription fees, Per-transaction processing fees, Premium support tier licensing

Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.png.
